name: Steamed Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the rice well.
2. Combine the rice with water and salt (if using) in an 8-cup microwaveable casserole.
3. Cover the casserole and microwave at high for 5 minutes.
4. Continue microwaving on medium until most of the water is absorbed, about 8 to 12 minutes.
5. Let stand covered for 5 to 10 minutes to absorb any remaining liquid.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
